summary: Transcript parser extracts both tool_use calls and tool_result blocks, follows subagent parentUuid chains
context: Phase 17 requires parsing real Claude Code JSONL session logs. Sessions contain multiple message types and may include subagent conversations via the Agent tool.
rationale: Capturing tool results alongside calls provides richer data for Phase 18 LLM-as-judge scoring. Including subagent calls captures the full picture of Twining usage since twining-aware-worker agents make most tool calls.

alternatives.option: Extract only tool_use calls without results
alternatives.reason_rejected: Would require re-parsing transcripts in Phase 18 when LLM judge needs result context

alternatives.option: Main conversation only, no subagent tracking
alternatives.reason_rejected: Most Twining usage happens in subagents — would miss the majority of tool calls
